title: AMRUT Notification 2026 - Apply for Technical Manager Posts
description: Atal Mission for Rejuvenation and Urban Transformation Assam (AMRUT Assam) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for Technical Manager Jobs. Candidates who have completed their B.E/ B.Tech in Civil Engineering can grab this chance and apply for the AMRUT Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can ...
